start.text: Karen is sitting up in bed, arms folded, watching you approach with the expression of someone who has been rehearsing what they're going to say.
start.speaker: empty

morning_karen.text: Morning, Karen. How are you feeling today?
morning_karen.speaker: player

lets_that_sit.text: She lets that sit for a moment. You wait.
lets_that_sit.speaker: empty

options.response: I want you to know. I made a complaint. About yesterday. I spoke to the head nurse this morning. Told her exactly what you said to me. Word for word. I have a very good memory.

stone_in_water.text: The words land like a stone dropped into still water. You feel the ripple move through you from your chest outward. Somewhere behind your ribs, the breath you were about to take doesn't quite arrive.
stone_in_water.speaker: empty

options.text: I understand. I'm sorry for what I said yesterday.

silence.text: She doesn't say it's okay. She doesn't say anything.
silence.speaker: empty
